name_en: 🆕【Exclusive Real Shot M80677 White Leopard Print】The Wild at Heart series special edition Zippy coin purse reimagines Monogram canvas with animal print style, revealing an abstract leopard print lining upon opening the zipper. The compact structure accommodates cards, bills, and coins.
name_cn:
🆕【Exclusive Real Shot M80677 White Leopard Print】The Wild at Heart series special edition Zippy coin purse reimagines Monogram canvas with animal print style, revealing an abstract leopard print lining upon opening the zipper. The compact structure accommodates cards, bills, and coins.
Detailed Features 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
